headline: SanDisk vs Seagate: Two Divergent Paths Through the AI Storage Boom, One Winner
summary: SanDisk and Seagate both posted stunning quarters fueled by AI demand, but they are chasing completely different versions of the storage boom. Which approach holds up when the cycle turns?
